SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JAMES GARNETT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE MOSSER HOTEL IS PRESENT. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT IS KEVIN BAZANT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2025 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARNETT, JAMES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE MOSSER HOTEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
